description_long: This is a tall, narrow chest of drawers with a distinctive curving silhouette, reminiscent of French or Baroque-inspired furniture. The chest features five vertically stacked drawers, each with a subtle outward bow at the front, giving the piece an elegant, sculpted appearance. The legs are slender and slightly curved, adding to the refined aesthetic and elevating the main body off the ground. The surface appears to be finished in a deep, glossy black, which enhances its sophisticated look. The handles are small and unobtrusive, blending into the overall design without drawing much attention. There are no visible locks or ornate carvings, but the overall shape and proportions make it a striking piece suitable for upscale urban interiors or boutique storefronts.
description: A tall, curvaceous black chest of drawers with five drawers and slender, curved legs, finished in a glossy surface. Its elegant silhouette and minimalist handles give it a refined, sophisticated appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing five stacked drawers with a bowed front and slender, curved legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the pronounced curvature of the chest's profile and the slimness of the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a smooth, unadorned back panel and the elegant curve of the body.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, emphasizing the chest's sculpted, narrow profile.
